response.overview: After nearly 6 years of marriage, Alya and Hairi's household begins to crack. His wife, Alya, cheats on him and becomes acquainted with a man named Zack. After divorcing, Alya takes Darius to live with Mak Yam. Alya often gets angry and scolds Mak Yam. Mak Yam is also forced to work hard selling nasi lemak to support her children and grandchild because Alya is lazy and only knows how to ask for money. Mak Yam gets injured because of Alya's actions. Alya then takes Darius away and lives with her boyfriend. Due to her lack of responsibility, Alya leaves Darius alone at home to go on vacation with her boyfriend. One by one, Alya commits bad deeds. What will be the fate of her son, Darius? Is it possible for Alya to change into a better mother and create a more perfect relationship with her child?
response.title: Debu-Debu Dosa
